# Allure Go Support

We use GitHub issues for confirmed bugs and actionable feature requests.

For questions about using Allure Report or Allure Go, please use:

- GitHub Discussions: https://github.com/orgs/allure-framework/discussions
- Allure documentation: https://allurereport.org/docs/
- Stack Overflow: https://stackoverflow.com/questions/tagged/allure

For Allure TestOps support, use https://help.qameta.io/support/home.

For security issues, do not open a public issue. See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).
